description: Ntropy provides financial data standardization and enrichment services, including transaction enrichment, categorization, entity identification, bank statement extraction, and related resources such as batches and webhooks. Its platform is aimed at enriching and managing banking and transaction data programmatically.
summary: Ntropy exposes an authenticated HTTP API at https://api.ntropy.network with a published OpenAPI spec, plus a Python package `ntropy-sdk` that uses the same API key via environment variable.
